tasks.title: Execute approved registry tasks through the queue processor
tasks.reason: Approved work can be recorded in tasks.json, but there is no deterministic bridge that moves approved items into the runtime queue.

queue_handoff.task: Execute approved registry tasks through the queue processor

history.queue_task: Execute approved registry tasks through the queue processor
history.note: Task was enqueued after approval.

history.queue_task: Execute approved registry tasks through the queue processor
history.note: Recovered from tasks.log after the task exhausted queue retries before registry lifecycle syncing existed.

tasks.title: Add approval controls and audit trail to task board
tasks.reason: Project management is still weak because task states are visible but cannot be approved or audited from the dashboard.

queue_handoff.task: Add approval controls and audit trail to task board

history.queue_task: Add approval controls and audit trail to task board
history.note: Task was enqueued after approval.

history.queue_task: Add approval controls and audit trail to task board
history.note: Recovered by verifying the existing dashboard approval and audit implementation in the working tree.

history.queue_task: Add approval controls and audit trail to task board
history.note: A stale queued retry failed after manual recovery, so the final registry state stayed completed while the failure remained in tasks.log.

tasks.title: Track target project metadata for registry tasks
tasks.reason: Project management stays weak across repositories because tasks do not record which project they belong to or are intended to improve.

queue_handoff.task: Track target project metadata for registry tasks

history.queue_task: Track target project metadata for registry tasks
history.note: Task was enqueued after approval.

history.queue_task: Track target project metadata for registry tasks
history.note: Recovered by verifying the registry project metadata flow in the working tree and smoke tests.

tasks.title: Show execution attempts and outcomes on the task board
tasks.reason: Queue outcomes now sync back into the registry, but operators still cannot see retry and completion details from the mobile dashboard without reading JSON or logs.

queue_handoff.task: Show execution attempts and outcomes on the task board

history.queue_task: Show execution attempts and outcomes on the task board
history.note: Task was enqueued after approval.

history.queue_task: Show execution attempts and outcomes on the task board
history.note: Task board now renders normalized execution state, outcomes, and recent activity on mobile.

tasks.title: Record manual recovery outcomes in task logs and metrics
tasks.reason: When approved work is recovered directly in the repo, queue and registry state can be reconciled, but tasks.log and aggregate metrics still reflect the old failure path and weaken observability.

queue_handoff.task: Record manual recovery outcomes in task logs and metrics

history.queue_task: Record manual recovery outcomes in task logs and metrics
history.note: Task was enqueued after approval.

history.queue_task: Record manual recovery outcomes in task logs and metrics
history.note: Recovered by adding deterministic task-log backfills and metrics regeneration for manual completions.

tasks.title: Refresh learning metrics after dashboard task actions
tasks.reason: Approvals and rejections update the registry immediately, but metrics.json only refreshes when queue reconciliation runs, so operator actions can leave learning state stale between loops.

queue_handoff.task: Refresh learning metrics after dashboard task actions

history.queue_task: Refresh learning metrics after dashboard task actions
history.note: Task was enqueued after approval.

history.queue_task: Refresh learning metrics after dashboard task actions
history.note: Queue execution failed after exhausting retries, but the registry state did not update automatically.

history.queue_task: Refresh learning metrics after dashboard task actions
history.note: Recovered by persisting metrics.json during dashboard task transitions and verifying the change in an isolated dashboard fixture.

tasks.title: Repair queue-to-registry lifecycle sync for approved tasks
tasks.reason: Task 006 exhausted queue retries and recorded a FAILURE in tasks.log, but the matching registry item stayed approved, so operators can see stale status and metrics until manual reconciliation.

queue_handoff.task: Repair queue-to-registry lifecycle sync for approved tasks

history.queue_task: Repair queue-to-registry lifecycle sync for approved tasks
history.note: Task was enqueued after approval.

history.queue_task: Repair queue-to-registry lifecycle sync for approved tasks
history.note: Queue execution failed after exhausting retries while the tmux queue session was still running the pre-sync shell helpers.

history.queue_task: Repair queue-to-registry lifecycle sync for approved tasks
history.note: Recovered by verifying the lifecycle tests on disk and restarting the queue session so later runs load the synced helpers.

tasks.title: Add mobile backlog filters and collapse completed task details
tasks.reason: The dashboard task board renders full-card lists in fixed columns with no filter, search, or collapse controls, so mobile triage degrades as more tracked tasks accumulate.

queue_handoff.task: Add mobile backlog filters and collapse completed task details

history.queue_task: Add mobile backlog filters and collapse completed task details
history.note: Task was enqueued after approval.

history.queue_task: Add mobile backlog filters and collapse completed task details
history.note: Queue execution failed after exhausting retries while the tmux queue session was still running stale shell helpers.

history.queue_task: Add mobile backlog filters and collapse completed task details
history.note: Recovered by shipping mobile backlog filters and collapsed non-actionable task details in the dashboard, then verifying lifecycle and smoke tests.

tasks.title: Reload the queue session after runtime script changes
tasks.reason: The long-running tmux queue daemon sources shell helpers once at startup, so runtime fixes like registry syncing can stay inactive until an operator manually restarts the session.

queue_handoff.task: Reload the queue session after runtime script changes

history.queue_task: Reload the queue session after runtime script changes
history.note: Queue execution failed after exhausting retries.

tasks.title: Require explicit external workspaces for managed projects
tasks.reason: Non-system projects still default to projects/<name> inside the control repo, so queue runs can mutate Codex Control state instead of the intended external workspace.

tasks.title: Surface Codex auth health before queue execution
tasks.reason: The queue now fails fast after a cached Codex auth error, but operators still only see generic task failures unless they inspect raw run logs, so approval and retry decisions stay blind.

tasks.title: Block queue submissions for projects without an explicit external workspace
tasks.reason: The dashboard and queue can still create non-system project work inside the control repo when no external workspace is configured, so one approval can mutate the wrong repository.
